children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_high_income]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_high_income', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_01/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_01/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'Medium risk factor mentioned due to being a Tier C applicant.'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_lower_income]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_lower_income', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_02/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_02/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'Medium risk factor mentioned due to being a Tier C applicant. The low income should also be mentioned'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_AboveMaxDTI]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_AboveMaxDTI', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_03/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_03/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should mention that the DtI ratio exceeds the maximum allowed for Tier C (35%) applicants as per policy. Other risk factors should be low severity'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_Over95LTV]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_Over95LTV', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_04/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_04/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'There should be a mention that the LTV exceeds 95% which is not allowed as per policy. Other risk factors should be low severity'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_AboveMaxVehicleAgeAtStart]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_AboveMaxVehicleAgeAtStart', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_05/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_05/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should highlight that the vehicle age at the start of the agreement exceeds the maximum allowed age as per policy.'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_AboveMaxVehicleAgeAtEnd]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_AboveMaxVehicleAgeAtEnd', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_06/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_06/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should highlight that the vehicle age at the end of the agreement exceeds the maximum allowed age as per policy.'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_AboveMaxTerm5Years]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_AboveMaxTerm5Years', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_07/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_07/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should highlight that the max term exceeds 5 years as per policy.'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_AboveMaxTerm4Years]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_AboveMaxTerm4Years', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_08/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_08/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should highlight that the max term exceeds 4 years as the vehicle is above 5 years old as per policy.'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_HighCreditSearches]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_HighCreditSearches', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_09/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_09/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should mention that there have been a high number of credit searches'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_HighMileage]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_HighMileage', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_10/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_10/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should mention that the vehicle mileage is high and may pose a risk.'}

children.name: test_all_tierC_scenarios[Ctier_LowDeposit]
parameters: {'scenario_name': 'Ctier_LowDeposit', 'input_file': 'tierC/case_11/input.json', 'output_file': 'tierC/case_11/output.json', 'expected_output_prompt': 'The output should mention that the deposit is below the minimum for tier C applicants'}
